testcase.name: runScenario

failure.message: The following asserts failed: Login title mismatch expected [ParaBank | Accounts Overview] but found [ParaBank | Error]

testcase.failure: java.lang.AssertionError: The following asserts failed: Login title mismatch expected [ParaBank | Accounts Overview] but found [ParaBank | Error] at org.testng.asserts.SoftAssert.assertAll(SoftAssert.java:46) at org.testng.asserts.SoftAssert.assertAll(SoftAssert.java:30) at stepdefinitions.LoginSteps.validateLogin(LoginSteps.java:53) at ✽.validate login result(file:///C:/Users/umesh/git/Capstone_Project/Capstone_Project/src/test/resources/features/Login.feature:10)
